name: archon-qwen-autopilot
description: Archon Autopilot — a human-gated accounts-payable agent. A bounded multi-step ReAct loop over Qwen function-calling (Alibaba Cloud Model Studio / DashScope): the agent autonomously recalls vendor history, validates, checks for duplicates and computes amount variance (read/analyze tools, no side-effect) before proposing ONE terminal action; nothing executes until a human approves the exact args (human-in-the-loop gate). Grounded on a persistent pgvector MemoryAgent foundation. Live Qwen wired, verified offline via deterministic Fakes. Track-4 (Autopilot Agent) entry; layers on the Track-1 Archon MemoryAgent.
